headlines.title: Judge temporarily halts Kennedy Center closure and orders Trump’s name be removed from the building
headlines.description: A federal judge temporarily blocked the Trump administration from closing the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts for repairs and ordered that it be removed from the building and its website.

headlines.title: Louisiana passes new congressional map, dismantling one majority-Black district
headlines.description: Louisiana Republicans approved a new congressional map Friday, eliminating one of the state’s two majority-Black districts and drawing an additional Republican-leaning district in its place

headlines.title: ICE agent charged in Minneapolis shooting is arrested in Texas
headlines.description: Christian Castro was taken into custody on charges of assault and falsely reporting a crime in connection with the Jan. shooting in Minneapolis of Julio Sosa-Celis during an attempted immigration arrest.

headlines.title: Blue Origin’s rocket explosion is a big setback for NASA’s moon goals
headlines.description: The giant explosion during a test of a Blue Origin rocket is a problem both for Jeff Bezos’ space company and for NASA.

headlines.title: The NBA Finals are a reward for long-suffering Knicks fans — and this broadcaster
headlines.description: ESPN’s Mike Breen will be the play-by-play man for his record-extending 21st straight NBA Finals this year. And for the first time, the New York native will be calling the team he grew up rooting for in the championship round.

headlines.title: Vomiting virus is spreading across most of the U.S.
headlines.description: Flu season may be mostly behind us, but levels of norovirus, the nasty, highly contagious stomach bug, are rising, according to wastewater data.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: No heavyweights allowed: Troops must meet fitness criteria to attend White House UFC event
headlines.description: WASHINGTON — The Defense Department is requiring members of the military to meet a certain body type criteria in order to attend the big Ultimate Fighting Championship event at the White House next month, according to two people familiar with the criteria and a Pentagon memo outlining the criteria that was reviewed by NBC News

headlines.title: N.J. establishes protected zone around ICE facility after several protesters are arrested during clashes
headlines.description: Democratic Gov. Mikie Sherill announced that the state would establish a protected peaceful protest zone outside Delaney Hall as she reiterated calls to shut down the facility.

headlines.title: Blue Origin’s rocket explosion is a big setback for NASA’s moon goals
headlines.description: The giant explosion during a test of a Blue Origin rocket is a problem both for Jeff Bezos’ space company and for NASA.

headlines.title: Lounge chair sold on Amazon recalled after person’s finger amputated
headlines.description: A lounge chair sold on Amazon is being recalled after a report that an individual’s finger was amputated while adjusting the chair, officials said Thursday.

headlines.title: Judge temporarily halts Kennedy Center closure and orders Trump’s name be removed from the building
headlines.description: A federal judge temporarily blocked the Trump administration from closing the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts for repairs and ordered that it be removed from the building and its website.
